description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a matte black finish, giving it a modern and utilitarian appearance. The body is angular with multiple vent holes along the upper receiver, likely for heat dissipation. It has a prominent pistol grip and a short, robust barrel, suggesting it is designed for close-quarters use. The fore-end is ribbed for improved grip, and there is a rail system on top for mounting optics or accessories. The magazine appears integrated or internal, and the stock is minimalistic, blending into the rear of the receiver. The overall construction suggests a focus on durability and ease of handling in urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black tactical rifle with a short barrel, vented receiver, and ribbed fore-end, designed for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the pistol grip, vented receiver, ribbed fore-end, and short barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, narrow profile, and alignment of the upper receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features of the first side, with clear visibility of the grip and fore-end.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver, grip, and the minimalistic stock design.
